metadata.reference: A. Ciesielski, L. Skowronski, W.Pacuski, T. Szoplik. Permittivity of Ge, Te and Se thin films in the 200–1500 nm spectral range. Predicting the segregation effects in silver. Mat. Sci. Semicond. Process. 81, 64-67 (2018) (Numerical data kindly provided by Arkadiusz Ciesielski)
metadata.comments: 2 nm-thick germanium film deposited directly on SiO<sub>2</sub> substrate
